items.title: How the Iran conflict is spreading — in pictures
items.description: Images published Thursday showed destruction across Tehran after nearly a week of strikes on Iran's capital.

items.title: How Iran and Venezuela strikes transform the Trump-Xi trade talks
items.description: The Iran war and the U.S. attack in Venezuela show a Trump administration more willing to eschew diplomacy and take military action.

items.title: Trump taps Sen. Markwayne Mullin after firing Kristi Noem as DHS secretary
items.description: Noem's chief advisor, Corey Lewandowski, will also leave his position at DHS, MS Now reported.
